title: crinum brevifolium var. bracteatum
intro: Crinum brevifolium var. bracteatum is a plant species that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family, commonly known as the crinum lily. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Crinum brevifolium var. bracteatum include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used as an antiseptic and a treatment for wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make extracts, tinctures, and infusions, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
